title: oxalis incerta
intro: Oxalis incerta, also known as the uncertain wood-sorrel or wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, and it may also have antioxidant and antiviral properties. Oxalis incerta can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
